name: Tulla Resources Plc
summary: Tulla Resources Plc explores for, evaluates, and develops gold property in Australia. It holds 50% interest in the Norseman Gold project located adjacent to the Norseman township, Western Australia. Tulla Resources Plc was formerly known as Norseman Gold Plc and changed its name to Tulla Resources Plc in December 2020. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Bondi Junction, Australia.
